calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Margaret DeMatteo, Esq., for the Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Kris Smith sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Elaine Kelley.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is Canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 626 Polk Street, Room 515, San Francisco CA 94102.
Judgment is for Possession only.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., APRIL-02-2014: ATTORNEY JOHN P. ZANGHI APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; PROPERTY MANAGER KRIS SMITH ALSO APPEARS ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. ATTORNEY MARGARET DEMATTEO ALSO APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF. THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT ELAINE KELLEY THIS DATE.

NO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS HELD; TRIAL DATE OF MONDAY, APRIL-07-2014 REMAINS.

NO PRO TEM JUDGE HOLDS A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED
(DEPT. 501).
